browse.noMoreHives: There are no more hives! Consider creating your own.

create.title: Create new hive
create.name: Name
create.descriptionPlaceholder: A community to discuss world politics.

settings.title: Hive Settings
settings.noPermission: You do not have permission to view these settings.

rulesSection.visibilityDescription: Control who can see and join this hive.
rulesSection.privateHiveDescription: Only members can view this hive, and it will not show up when browsing hives.
rulesSection.requireApprovalToJoinDescription: Users must be approved before they can join this hive.
rulesSection.honeyRequiredToJoinDescription: Users must have at least <honey/> to join this hive.
rulesSection.postingDescription: Control who can create posts in this hive.
rulesSection.requireApprovalToPostDescription: Posts must be approved before they can be published in this hive.
rulesSection.honeyRequiredToPostDescription: Users must have at least <honey/> to post in this hive.
rulesSection.whoCanPostDescription: Users must at least be part of the following group to post in this hive.
rulesSection.commentingDescription: Control who can comment on posts in this hive.
rulesSection.honeyRequiredToCommentDescription: Users must have at least <honey/> to comment in this hive.
rulesSection.whoCanCommentDescription: Users must at least be part of the following group to comment in this hive.
